msk.cluster.BrokerNodeGroupInfo.Description: Information about the broker nodes in the cluster.

msk.cluster.ClientAuthentication.Description: Includes all client authentication related information.

msk.cluster.ConfigurationInfo.Description: Represents the configuration that you want MSK to use for the cluster.

msk.cluster.CurrentVersion.Description: The version of the cluster that you want to update.

msk.cluster.EnhancedMonitoring.Description: Specifies the level of monitoring for the MSK cluster. The possible values are `DEFAULT`, `PER_BROKER`, and `PER_TOPIC_PER_BROKER`.

msk.cluster.KafkaVersion.Description: The version of Apache Kafka. You can use Amazon MSK to create clusters that use Apache Kafka versions 1.1.1 and 2.2.1.

msk.cluster.NumberOfBrokerNodes.Description: The number of broker nodes in the cluster.

msk.cluster.StorageMode.Description: This controls storage mode for supported storage tiers.

msk.cluster.Tags.Description: Create tags when creating the cluster.
